name: fintech-wyden

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/mobile
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ci --workspace=apps/api && npm run lint --workspace=apps/mobile
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/api && npm run test --workspace=apps/mobile
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build

comment:overrides: React Native 0.85.3 bundles react-native-renderer@19.2.3 and peer-requires react@^19.2.3, so the whole React family MUST be exactly 19.2.3 or the app crashes with 'Incompatible React versions' (react vs react-native-renderer). react-dom is only an optional peer (web) but its latest pulled react up to 19.2.7; we pin it down too. react-test-renderer must also match so jest's renderer agrees ('Can't access .root on unmounted test renderer'). Keep all four locked together.
